description:
## What it does

GoPlus Security API over x402: scan token contracts and wallet addresses for risks — honeypots, buy/sell tax, mintable/blacklist/proxy permissions and known malicious addresses — through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- Pre-trade safety screening before a swap.
- Wallet / address risk checks before transfers or approvals.
- Automated due-diligence inside agent trading flows.

## Endpoints

- `GET /api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}` — Token security report (honeypot, taxes, owner privileges, holders) for one or more contracts
- `GET /api/v1/address_security/{address}` — Malicious-address check (sanctions, phishing, known scam)
- `GET /api/v2/token_approval_security/{chain_id}` — Token approval / allowance risk check for one or more wallet addresses; pass `addresses` as a query parameter

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet supports `exact` + `permit2` and `exact_gasfree`; GasFree example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/728126428?contract_addresses=TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t'
```

Pay on TRON Mainnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:0x2b6653dc \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain Mainnet (`eip155:56`, `exact` + `permit2`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/api/v1/token_security/56?contract_addresses=0x55d398326f99059fF775485246999027B3197955'
```

Pay on BNB Smart Chain Mainnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

endpoints.description: Token security report (honeypot, taxes, owner privileges, holders) for one or more contracts
Token approval / allowance risk check for one or more wallet addresses. Pass the `addresses` query parameter as required by GoPlus.

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

GoPlus 安全 API 的 x402 网关:扫描代币合约与钱包地址风险——貔貅、买卖税、增发/黑名单/代理权限以及已知恶意地址,一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC。

## 适合场景

- 兑换前的安全筛查。
- 转账或授权前的地址风险检查。
- Agent 交易流中的自动尽调。

## 接口

- `GET /api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}` — 代币安全报告(貔貅、买卖税、所有者权限、持币分布),支持单/多合约
- `GET /api/v1/address_security/{address}` — 恶意地址检测(制裁、钓鱼、已知诈骗)
- `GET /api/v2/token_approval_security/{chain_id}` — 钱包授权/额度风险检测; 通过 `addresses` 查询参数传入一个或多个地址

## 调用示例

这些是 x402 付费直通路由,通过 x402 支付后访问网关。TRON 主网同时支持 `exact` + `permit2` 和 `exact_gasfree`; 以下为 GasFree 示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/728126428?contract_addresses=TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 TRON 主网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:0x2b6653dc \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain 主网(`eip155:56`,`exact` + `permit2`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/api/v1/token_security/56?contract_addresses=0x55d398326f99059fF775485246999027B3197955'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 BNB Smart Chain 主网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```
zh-CN.mainTitle: 代币与地址安全风控检测
zh-CN.subtitle: 交易前安全筛查:兑换、转账与授权。
zh-CN.title: GoPlus
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

title: GoPlus
use_case: Use before buying a token, approving an allowance, or sending to an address: check if a token is a honeypot/scam, whether an address is malicious, and whether an approval is risky.
